preamble: The debuccalization of the velar-lateral affricate [kʟ] into the glottal fricative [h] represents a complete loss of dorsal and lateral articulation, characteristic of extreme lenition paths.

examples.note: End-stage weakening of the dorsal-lateral series in unstressed or final positions.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
